text:
There once was a charming old bookstore owner named Miss Finch. She loved everything about books. Every morning she would wake up early to wander through her favorite aisles, reading titles aloud. One foggy afternoon, a young girl named Lily wandered in.

"Loombos?" Miss Finch cheerful voiced.

"N Hawthorne?"

"A delightful choice."

She was so absorbed in storytelling that Lily couldn ounces a word-order complaint. After lending them a classic story about courage, Miss Finch invited Lily. They spent hours talking under the warm glow of vintage lamps.

As night fell, Lily left with a newfound love for books. And Miss Finch? She felt an old heart soar.

That's my story.
